name: Shoo Fly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry and chill.
2. Dissolve baking soda and hot water in molasses.
3. Blend in the beaten egg yolk.
4. Pour into the prepared pie crust.
5. Combine remaining ingredients to make crumbs.
6. Sprinkle crumbs over the pie.
7. Bake in a preheated 400 degree Fahrenheit oven for about 10 minutes or until the crust begins to brown.
8. Reduce temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and bake until the top is firm.
